title: Mahogany Chicken Wings
ingredients: 40 pieces of separated chicken wings (no wing tips)
2 quarter size pieces of fresh ginger, minced
instructions: Combine orange juice, soy sauce, water, brown sugar, orange zest, garlic and ginger in large bowl.
Add the chicken wing pieces and stir to coat.
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight, stirring once or twice to ensure marinade thoroughly covers all wing pieces.
Remove wings from the marinade and arrange them on well-oiled baking sheets.
Bake at 375 degrees for 50-55 minutes, turning the wings halfway through the cooking time, until glossy and a little sticky.
If there is still liquid on the baking pan, continue baking to evaporate it.
Mound the wings on a serving platter and garnish with orange slices and chopped scallions.
notes: Adapted from Pacific Northwest Palate Cookbook by Susan Bradley, 1989
Wings are delicious served hot or at room temperature
